lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਸ ਦੇ ਏਹਿ ਚਲਤ ਹਹਿ ਸੋ ਜੀਵਉ ਦੇਵਣਹਾਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jan naanak jis de ehi chalat heh so jeevau devanahaar |2|
lines.english: O servant Nanak, wondrous are the plays of the Lord, the Giver of life. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਲੁ ਕੂੜੀ ਨਾਮਿ ਉਤਾਰੀਅਨੁ ਜਪਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਹੋਆ ਸਚਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: mal koorree naam utaareean jap naam hoaa sachiaar |
lines.english: The Naam washes off the filth of falsehood; chanting the Naam, one becomes truthful.
Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਜੇਵਡੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਨਾਹਿ ਕਿਸੁ ਆਖਿ ਸੁਣਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: tudh jevadd daataa naeh kis aakh sunaaeeai |
lines.english: You are the Great Giver; no other is as great as You. Unto whom should I speak and talk?

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਪਾਇ ਜਿਥਹੁ ਹਉਮੈ ਜਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee paae jithahu haumai jaaeeai |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, I find You; You eradicate egotism from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਸ ਕਸ ਸਾਦਾ ਬਾਹਰਾ ਸਚੀ ਵਡਿਆਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: ras kas saadaa baaharaa sachee vaddiaaeeai |
lines.english: You are beyond sweet and salty flavors; True is Your glorious greatness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਰਖਿਓਨੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਕਿਸੈ ਪਿਆਈ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: ghatt antar amrit rakhion guramukh kisai piaaee |9|
lines.english: You have placed the Ambrosial Nectar deep within the heart; the Gurmukh drinks it in. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਬਖਸੇ ਤਿਸੁ ਦੇਇ ਆਪਿ ਲਏ ਮਿਲਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: jis no bakhase tis dee aap le milaaeeai |
lines.english: You bless those whom You forgive, and unite them with Yourself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੁ ਮੰਨਿ ਲੈਨਿ ਸੇਈ ਕਰਮ ਕਰੇਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: ji satigur bhaavai su man lain seee karam karen |
lines.english: They accept what is pleasing to the Will of the True Guru, and act accordingly.
The stories of one's ancestors make the children good children.
Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਇ ਪੁਛਹੁ ਸਿਮ੍ਰਿਤਿ ਸਾਸਤ ਬਿਆਸ ਸੁਕ ਨਾਰਦ ਬਚਨ ਸਭ ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਕਰੇਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: jaae puchhahu simrit saasat biaas suk naarad bachan sabh srisatt karen |
lines.english: Go and consult the Simritees, the Shaastras, the writings of Vyaas, Suk Dayv, Naarad, and all those who preach to the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੈ ਲਾਏ ਸਚਿ ਲਗੇ ਸਦਾ ਸਚੁ ਸਮਾਲੇਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: sachai laae sach lage sadaa sach samaalen |
lines.english: Those, whom the True Lord attaches, are attached to the Truth; they contemplate the True Name forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੂ ਜਿਨਾ ਕਾ ਅੰਧੁਲਾ ਸਿਖ ਭੀ ਅੰਧੇ ਕਰਮ ਕਰੇਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: guroo jinaa kaa andhulaa sikh bhee andhe karam karen |
lines.english: The disciples whose teacher is blind, act blindly as well.
Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਆਏ ਸੇ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ਭਏ ਜਿ ਸਗਲੇ ਕੁਲ ਤਾਰੇਨਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak aae se paravaan bhe ji sagale kul taaren |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, their coming into the world is approved; they redeem all their ancestors. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਇ ਭਾਣੈ ਚਲਨਿ ਆਪਣੈ ਨਿਤ ਝੂਠੋ ਝੂਠੁ ਬੋਲੇਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: oe bhaanai chalan aapanai nit jhoottho jhootth bolen |
lines.english: They walk according to their own wills, and continually speak falsehood and lies.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜੁ ਕੁਸਤੁ ਕਮਾਵਦੇ ਪਰ ਨਿੰਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਕਰੇਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: koorr kusat kamaavade par nindaa sadaa karen |
lines.english: They practice falsehood and deception, and endlessly slander others.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਇ ਆਪਿ ਡੁਬੇ ਪਰ ਨਿੰਦਕਾ ਸਗਲੇ ਕੁਲ ਡੋਬੇਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: oe aap ddube par nindakaa sagale kul ddoben |
lines.english: Slandering others, they drown themselves, and drown all their generations as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਤੁ ਓਇ ਲਾਏ ਤਿਤੁ ਲਗੇ ਉਇ ਬਪੁੜੇ ਕਿਆ ਕਰੇਨਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak jit oe laae tith lage ue bapurre kiaa karen |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, whatever the Lord links them to, to that they are linked; what can the poor creatures do? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਨਦਰੀ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਰਖਦਾ ਜੇਤੀ ਸਿਸਟਿ ਸਭ ਕੀਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: sabh nadaree andar rakhadaa jetee sisatt sabh keetee |
lines.english: He keeps all under His Gaze; He created the entire Universe.
Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਦਾ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh sadaa dhiaaeeai andar har preetee |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs meditate on the Lord forever; their inner beings are filled with love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਕੂੜਿ ਕੁਸਤਿ ਲਾਇਅਨੁ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਵਿਗੂਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: eik koorr kusat laaeian manamukh vigootee |
lines.english: He has linked some to falsehood and deception; these self-willed manmukhs are plundered.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਪੋਤੈ ਪੁੰਨੁ ਹੈ ਤਿਨੑ ਵਾਤਿ ਸਿਪੀਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: jin kau potai pun hai tina vaat sipeetee |
lines.english: Those who have the treasure of virtue, chant the Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਸਚੁ ਸਿਫਤਿ ਸਨਾਈ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: naanak naam dhiaaeeai sach sifat sanaaee |10|
lines.english: O Nanak, meditate on the Naam, and the Glorious Praises of the True Lord. ||10||
Men of charity gather wealth by committing sins, and then give it away in donations to charity.
Their spiritual teachers go to their homes to instruct them.
The woman loves the man only for his wealth;
Salok, First Mehl:
Everyone worships himself.
No one obeys the Shaastras or the Vedas.
they come and go as they please.
Becoming judges, they sit and administer justice.
They accept bribes, and block justice.
They chant on their malas, and call upon God.
The Muslim scriptures are in their ears and in their hearts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਕੋ ਪੁਛੈ ਤਾ ਪੜਿ ਸੁਣਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: je ko puchhai taa parr sunaae |
lines.english: If someone asks them, they read quotations from their books.
They anoint their kitchens to try to become pure.
Behold, such is the Hindu.
They plunder the people, and engage in gossip and flattery.
The Yogi, with matted hair and ashes on his body, has become a householder.
Why does he apply ashes to his forehead?
He does not attain Yoga - he has lost his way.
The children weep in front of him and behind him.
O Nanak, this is the sign of the Dark Age of Kali Yuga;
everyone says that he himself knows. ||1||
The Hindu comes to the house of a Hindu.
First Mehl:
The Muslim glorifies his own faith.
He puts on the thread, but does evil deeds.
He puts the sacred thread around his neck and reads the scriptures.
His cleansings and washings will not be approved.
